title: crataegus pinnatifida var. korolkowii
intro: Crataegus pinnatifida var. korolkowii, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a variety of the Chinese hawthorn tree, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crataegus pinnatifida var. korolkowii include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
